description_long: This apartment building is a grand, symmetrical structure with a stately appearance, featuring a central main block flanked by two wings. The roof is steeply pitched and dark gray, adorned with multiple dormer windows and chimneys, suggesting a classic European influence. The facade is light-colored, with regularly spaced tall windows and subtle decorative elements, giving it an elegant and formal look. One wing has a distinct reddish-brown roof, possibly indicating a different function or era of construction. The building sits on a broad, flat base, and the main entrance is likely located at the center of the longer facade, marked by a slight projection and additional architectural detailing. The overall impression is of a prestigious, multi-story residential building, possibly inspired by Baroque or Neoclassical styles.
description: A grand, symmetrical apartment building with a steep gray roof, light facade, and regularly spaced tall windows, featuring a prominent central section and a reddish-brown roofed wing.
description_view_0: The long facade is visible, showing the main entrance area, symmetrical window arrangement, and the contrasting reddish-brown roof on the left wing.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is seen, highlighting the depth of the structure and the central roofline with dormers and chimneys.
description_view_2: The opposite long facade is shown, mirroring the symmetry and window arrangement, with the reddish-brown roofed wing now on the right.
description_view_3: The rear short end is visible, displaying the end of the reddish-brown roofed wing and the building's overall depth.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced vertical and horizontal rows across all facades, contributing to a balanced and formal appearance.
